summary: PO Resolution Feature Testing Complete - All 38 tests passed. Metrics endpoint returns correct data (70% PO resolution rate, 40% BC link rate). Fixed bug in document_readiness_service.py where doc_type variable was referenced but not defined. All PO resolution features working correctly.

minor.issue: BC API cannot connect in preview environment (invalid tenant). BC reference cache has real data from production sync.

critical_code_review_comments: document_readiness_service.py: Fixed bug at line 85 where doc_type was used but not defined in compute_signals()
po_resolution_service.py: normalize_po correctly strips PO/P.O./Purchase Order prefixes, preserves alphanumeric chars
po_resolution_service.py: extract_po_candidates correctly handles comma-separated values, extracts from po_number/order_number fields and raw text regex
document_pipeline.py: po_resolution stage correctly positioned between entity_resolution and transaction_match
auto_clear_service.py: CHECK 5a correctly requires po_resolution='resolved' for shipping docs
transaction_matching_service.py: Uses PO resolution results for PO_REQUIRED_DOC_TYPES
test_credentials: N/A - API tests used public endpoints
seed_data_creation: N/A - Used existing 10 shipping-style documents in database
context_for_next_testing_agent: PO Resolution feature is complete. GET /api/po-resolution/metrics returns: 10 shipping docs, 70% resolution rate (7/10), 40% BC link rate (4/10). Match methods: bc_cache_exact (4), local_po_draft (3). Key PO numbers: 109023, 107346 (BC match), 107459/107460 (multi-PO same vendor), SI-02-26-31488 (no BC match).

verified: Response has all required fields: total_shipping_docs, po_resolution, bc_link, queue, match_methods, by_doc_type
Metrics values match expected: 10 docs, 7 resolved, 4 BC linked
Extracts from raw text via regex patterns
Deduplicates same PO from multiple sources
CHECK 5a in auto_clear_service.py checks po_resolution for PO_REQUIRED_DOC_TYPES
Shipping docs cannot auto-clear without resolved PO
compute_signals checks po_resolution.status for shipping docs
Non-shipping docs only need po_number field presence
Uses po_resolution field for shipping doc matching

bug_fixed.issue: Line 85 referenced 'doc_type' variable which was never defined in compute_signals() function
bug_fixed.fix: Added line to extract doc_type from doc: doc_type = doc.get('document_type') or doc.get('suggested_job_type') or ''
bug_fixed.impact: Without this fix, readiness engine would crash when processing any document due to NameError

mocked_api_note: BC API cannot connect in preview environment (invalid tenant). BC reference cache has 1616 purchase orders from production sync.
